goal: Reproduce new best blend (nested CV 8.697, leak-free) as self-contained submission kernel

issues.pilk_tcn_scale_anomaly: TCN loads (strict state_dict OK) and runs per package method, but delta mean=-35.6 vs package OOF mean +1.63 / smoke -3.37. Suspected long hidden-tail extrapolation; projection postproc absorbs most bias (well-mean tvt nearly identical with/without). 6-comp variant provided.
issues.ravaghi_nondeterminism: cell9 build_well has no per-well np.random.seed -> PF features vary run-to-run; rav_* deltas shifted ~1 unit between two runs. Minor; consider seeding for reproducibility.
